params.prompt: Vertical portrait photograph for a barbershop brand tile, exact 4:5 aspect ratio, 1080x1350. High-contrast black and white editorial photography, duotone grading with a warm golden-yellow rim/key light used only as an implied light source, never a flat color wash, no straight color photography. Scene: a barber standing behind a seated male client, actively combing and styling the client's finished, well-groomed beard, both figures confident and focused, moody barbershop interior fully in frame behind them, editorial finish, cinematic lighting. Absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no graphic overlays, no UI elements anywhere in the image -- pure photography only, a clean background plate.
